title: Topsoe Chosen as Technology Provider by Zhejiang Jianglan for SAF project
content: Topsoe, a leading global provider of advanced technology and solutions for the energy transition, has signed an agreement with Zhejiang Jianglan, a company in the Jianglan Energy Group that specializes in areas of the energy transition, to provide technology and services to produce SAF. The project is located in Zhoushan City in the eastern province of Zhejiang, China, and will utilize Topsoeâ€™s HydroFlexÂ® technology, licensing, technical expertise and engineering services as well as its proprietary catalysts for SAF production.
author: Analysts Account
